context: Evaluates use of crypto-browserify's pbkdf2Sync function for password-based key derivation. The solution should correctly pass all five PBKDF2 parameters and return the resulting Buffer.

checklist.name: Uses pbkdf2Sync
checklist.description: The solution calls pbkdf2Sync(password, salt, iterations, keyLength, digest) from crypto-browserify, not a manual or alternative implementation.

checklist.name: All 5 parameters passed
checklist.description: All five required parameters (password, salt, iterations, keyLength, digest) are passed to pbkdf2Sync in the correct order.

checklist.name: Returns Buffer
checklist.description: The function returns the Buffer directly from pbkdf2Sync without unnecessary conversion.

checklist.name: Correct parameter mapping
checklist.description: The function parameters are mapped correctly: password → password, salt → salt, iterations → iterations, keyLength → keylen, digest → digest.
